_meta.author: ayushmxxn
_meta.title: Feature Section
_meta.description:
A sleek, animated feature section showcasing steps with engaging visuals and smooth transitions.

Features
- Auto-advancing steps with progress
- Smooth animations and transitions
- Responsive design
- Image carousel with transitions
- Customizable timing and appearance
- shadcn/ui theme integration
- Progress indicators
- Checkmark for completed steps
